title: Affirmations
description: Gain self confidence, improve how you tackle and improve your mental health and foster the ability to think and learn from your past to improve your future

title: Coffee Connection
description: A full stack MERN application built on top of Yelps Fusion Business Search API.

title: Covid Insider
description: Website that uses the COVID Tracking Project API to display COVID-19 data for each state in the US. Leveraging ChartJS to display the data in a visual way for the user to easily digest.

title: CoinInsights
description: React application using the CoinGecko API and ChartJS to do data visualizations of Crypto Currency price fluctuations over time. (Login with demo@demo.com and password: Demo123!) for demo experience.
